description:
You are a molecular biologist setting up documentation for a new pooled CRISPR knockout screen in SciNote ELN. Your lab is conducting a genome-wide knockout screen targeting KRAS-pathway genes in HCT116 colorectal cancer cells using a lentiviral sgRNA library.

Create a project named 'CRISPR Knockout Screen - KRAS' containing two experiments. The 'sgRNA Library Synthesis' experiment must include a sequential workflow of three tasks: 'Oligo Design and Ordering', 'PCR Amplification', and 'Library Cloning'. The 'Cell Line Engineering' experiment must include a sequential workflow of two tasks: 'Lentiviral Production' and 'Cell Transduction and Selection'. Add a protocol to the 'Lentiviral Production' task documenting the procedure with at least 6
